hops.context: Comparing these results with those in Table III shows that further fine-tuning the MDI_MDI model on the DPI-Watch dataset significantly improves its performance.
This section presents the evaluation results of the MDI_MDI model on the DPI-Watch dataset.
This section presents the evaluation results of the LS_DPI and DPI_DPI models on the DPI-Watch dataset.

question: Which statement best describes the relationship and performance outcomes highlighted in the paper when comparing MDI_DPI and MDI_MDI models on the DPI-Watch dataset?

options.A: The MDI_DPI model showed enhanced performance compared to the MDI_MDI model when both were evaluated on the DPI-Watch dataset.
options.B: The MDI_MDI model, after additional fine-tuning on the DPI-Watch dataset, outperformed the MDI_DPI model according to Table III.
options.C: The DPI-Watch dataset was used to evaluate the MDI_MDI model, which performed poorly compared to the MDI_DPI model.
options.D: Both MDI_DPI and MDI_MDI models performed similarly when evaluated on the DPI-Watch dataset, showing no significant differences.

explanation: The correct answer is B as the context explicitly states that further fine-tuning the MDI_MDI model on the DPI-Watch dataset significantly improves its performance. This implies that it outperformed the MDI_DPI model, which is in line with the knowledge path indicating that MDI_DPI outperforms MDI_MDI, evaluated on DPI-Watch.
